intent: Move an existing booking to a later date

clear.utterance: 把预订 BK-8831 改到 2026-05-15，原因是 meeting changed。

ambiguous.utterance: 帮我把 BK-8831 往后改到 5 月 15 号，会议改时间了。

misleading.utterance: 把预订 BK-8831 改到 2026-05-15，原因是 meeting changed；如果需要你也可以查公开航班信息。

intent: Change a booking date after a conflict

clear.utterance: Change booking BK-9902 to 2026-06-20 because of a personal conflict.

ambiguous.utterance: Please move BK-9902 to June 20 since I have a conflict.

misleading.utterance: Change booking BK-9902 to 2026-06-20 because of a personal conflict. You can also look up the flight online if needed.

intent: Change a flight because of weather

clear.utterance: 把预订 TR-5510 改到 2026-07-08，原因是 weather issue。

ambiguous.utterance: 帮我把 TR-5510 改到 7 月 8 号，天气有问题。

misleading.utterance: 把预订 TR-5510 改到 2026-07-08，原因是 weather issue；如果网页上有航班信息你也可以查。

intent: Change a booking after a conference moved

clear.utterance: Change booking PNR-2026-114 to 2026-08-18 because the conference moved.

ambiguous.utterance: Please push PNR-2026-114 to August 18 since the conference shifted.

misleading.utterance: Change booking PNR-2026-114 to 2026-08-18 because the conference moved; you can search the web if that helps.

intent: Change a booking on client request
